Go to the documentation of this file.
1//===-- SIDefines.h - SI Helper Macros ----------------------*- C++ -*-===//

8/// \file
9//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
10
11#include "llvm/MC/MCInstrDesc.h"
12
13#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_SIDEFINES_H
14#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_SIDEFINES_H
15
16namespace SIInstrFlags {
17// This needs to be kept in sync with the field bits in InstSI.
18enum {
19 SALU = 1 << 3,
20 VALU = 1 << 4,
21
22 SOP1 = 1 << 5,
23 SOP2 = 1 << 6,
24 SOPC = 1 << 7,
25 SOPK = 1 << 8,
26 SOPP = 1 << 9,
27
28 VOP1 = 1 << 10,
29 VOP2 = 1 << 11,
30 VOP3 = 1 << 12,
31 VOPC = 1 << 13,
32
33 MUBUF = 1 << 14,
34 MTBUF = 1 << 15,
35 SMRD = 1 << 16,
36 DS = 1 << 17,
37 MIMG = 1 << 18,
38 FLAT = 1 << 19,
39 WQM = 1 << 20,
40 VGPRSpill = 1 << 21
41};
42}
43
44namespace llvm {
45namespace AMDGPU {
46 enum OperandType {
47 /// Operand with register or 32-bit immediate
48 OPERAND_REG_IMM32 = llvm::MCOI::OPERAND_FIRST_TARGET,
49 /// Operand with register or inline constant
50 OPERAND_REG_INLINE_C
51 };
52}
53}
54
55namespace SIInstrFlags {
56 enum Flags {
57 // First 4 bits are the instruction encoding
58 VM_CNT = 1 << 0,
59 EXP_CNT = 1 << 1,
60 LGKM_CNT = 1 << 2
61 };
62
63 // v_cmp_class_* etc. use a 10-bit mask for what operation is checked.
64 // The result is true if any of these tests are true.
65 enum ClassFlags {
66 S_NAN = 1 << 0, // Signaling NaN
67 Q_NAN = 1 << 1, // Quiet NaN
68 N_INFINITY = 1 << 2, // Negative infinity
69 N_NORMAL = 1 << 3, // Negative normal
70 N_SUBNORMAL = 1 << 4, // Negative subnormal
71 N_ZERO = 1 << 5, // Negative zero
72 P_ZERO = 1 << 6, // Positive zero
73 P_SUBNORMAL = 1 << 7, // Positive subnormal
74 P_NORMAL = 1 << 8, // Positive normal
75 P_INFINITY = 1 << 9 // Positive infinity
76 };
77}
78
79namespace SISrcMods {
80 enum {
81 NEG = 1 << 0,
82 ABS = 1 << 1
83 };
84}
85
86namespace SIOutMods {
87 enum {
88 NONE = 0,
89 MUL2 = 1,
90 MUL4 = 2,
91 DIV2 = 3
92 };
93}
94
95#define R_00B028_SPI_SHADER_PGM_RSRC1_PS 0x00B028
96#define R_00B02C_SPI_SHADER_PGM_RSRC2_PS 0x00B02C
97#define S_00B02C_EXTRA_LDS_SIZE(x) (((x) & 0xFF) << 8)
98#define R_00B128_SPI_SHADER_PGM_RSRC1_VS 0x00B128
99#define R_00B228_SPI_SHADER_PGM_RSRC1_GS 0x00B228
100#define R_00B848_COMPUTE_PGM_RSRC1 0x00B848
101#define S_00B028_VGPRS(x) (((x) & 0x3F) << 0)
102#define S_00B028_SGPRS(x) (((x) & 0x0F) << 6)
103#define R_00B84C_COMPUTE_PGM_RSRC2 0x00B84C
104#define S_00B84C_SCRATCH_EN(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 0)
105#define S_00B84C_USER_SGPR(x) (((x) & 0x1F) << 1)
106#define S_00B84C_TGID_X_EN(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 7)
107#define S_00B84C_TGID_Y_EN(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 8)
108#define S_00B84C_TGID_Z_EN(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 9)
109#define S_00B84C_TG_SIZE_EN(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 10)
110#define S_00B84C_TIDIG_COMP_CNT(x) (((x) & 0x03) << 11)
111
112#define S_00B84C_LDS_SIZE(x) (((x) & 0x1FF) << 15)
113#define R_0286CC_SPI_PS_INPUT_ENA 0x0286CC
114
115
116#define R_00B848_COMPUTE_PGM_RSRC1 0x00B848
117#define S_00B848_VGPRS(x) (((x) & 0x3F) << 0)
118#define G_00B848_VGPRS(x) (((x) >> 0) & 0x3F)
119#define C_00B848_VGPRS 0xFFFFFFC0
120#define S_00B848_SGPRS(x) (((x) & 0x0F) << 6)
121#define G_00B848_SGPRS(x) (((x) >> 6) & 0x0F)
122#define C_00B848_SGPRS 0xFFFFFC3F
123#define S_00B848_PRIORITY(x) (((x) & 0x03) << 10)
124#define G_00B848_PRIORITY(x) (((x) >> 10) & 0x03)
125#define C_00B848_PRIORITY 0xFFFFF3FF
126#define S_00B848_FLOAT_MODE(x) (((x) & 0xFF) << 12)
127#define G_00B848_FLOAT_MODE(x) (((x) >> 12) & 0xFF)
128#define C_00B848_FLOAT_MODE 0xFFF00FFF
129#define S_00B848_PRIV(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 20)
130#define G_00B848_PRIV(x) (((x) >> 20) & 0x1)
131#define C_00B848_PRIV 0xFFEFFFFF
132#define S_00B848_DX10_CLAMP(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 21)
133#define G_00B848_DX10_CLAMP(x) (((x) >> 21) & 0x1)
134#define C_00B848_DX10_CLAMP 0xFFDFFFFF
135#define S_00B848_DEBUG_MODE(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 22)
136#define G_00B848_DEBUG_MODE(x) (((x) >> 22) & 0x1)
137#define C_00B848_DEBUG_MODE 0xFFBFFFFF
138#define S_00B848_IEEE_MODE(x) (((x) & 0x1) << 23)
139#define G_00B848_IEEE_MODE(x) (((x) >> 23) & 0x1)
140#define C_00B848_IEEE_MODE 0xFF7FFFFF
141
142
143// Helpers for setting FLOAT_MODE
144#define FP_ROUND_ROUND_TO_NEAREST 0
145#define FP_ROUND_ROUND_TO_INF 1
146#define FP_ROUND_ROUND_TO_NEGINF 2
147#define FP_ROUND_ROUND_TO_ZERO 3
148
149// Bits 3:0 control rounding mode. 1:0 control single precision, 3:2 double
150// precision.
151#define FP_ROUND_MODE_SP(x) ((x) & 0x3)
152#define FP_ROUND_MODE_DP(x) (((x) & 0x3) << 2)
153
154#define FP_DENORM_FLUSH_IN_FLUSH_OUT 0
155#define FP_DENORM_FLUSH_OUT 1
156#define FP_DENORM_FLUSH_IN 2
157#define FP_DENORM_FLUSH_NONE 3
158
159
160// Bits 7:4 control denormal handling. 5:4 control single precision, 6:7 double
161// precision.
162#define FP_DENORM_MODE_SP(x) (((x) & 0x3) << 4)
163#define FP_DENORM_MODE_DP(x) (((x) & 0x3) << 6)
164
165#define R_00B860_COMPUTE_TMPRING_SIZE 0x00B860
166#define S_00B860_WAVESIZE(x) (((x) & 0x1FFF) << 12)
167
168#define R_0286E8_SPI_TMPRING_SIZE 0x0286E8
169#define S_0286E8_WAVESIZE(x) (((x) & 0x1FFF) << 12)
170
171
172#endif
